languages.text: Ведомый железной рукой сво{mf|его|ей} праведн{mf|ого|ой} влады{mf|ки|чицы}, 32-ой меровский полк стал бичом врагов Императора.
Led by the iron hand of its righteous ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the scourge of the Emperor's enemies.
languages.original_text: Ведомый железной рукой сво{mf|его|ей} праведн{mf|ого|ой} влады{mf|ки|чицы}, 32-ой меровский полк стал бичом врагов Императора.

traits.locale_text: Led by the iron hand of its righteous ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the scourge of the Emperor's enemies.
Led by the iron hand of its righteous ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the scourge of the Emperor's enemies.
Led by the iron hand of its righteous ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the scourge of the Emperor's enemies.

languages.text: 正義の君主の鉄の腕によって率いられた32番目のメロフ連隊は、皇帝の敵の恐怖となった。
languages.original_text: Led by the iron hand of its righteous ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the scourge of the Emperor's enemies.

traits.locale_text: 正義の君主の鉄の腕によって率いられた32番目のメロフ連隊は、皇帝の敵の恐怖となった。

languages.text: 在其正义统治者的铁腕领导下，梅罗夫第32团成了帝皇之敌的克星。
languages.original_text: Led by the iron hand of its righteous ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the scourge of the Emperor's enemies.

traits.locale_text: 在其正义统治者的铁腕领导下，梅罗夫第32团成了帝皇之敌的克星。

languages.text: Mené d'une main de fer par {mf|son dirigeant|sa dirigeante} légitime, le 32e régiment de Merov devint le fléau des ennemis de l'Empereur.
languages.original_text: Led by the iron hand of its righteous ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the scourge of the Emperor's enemies.

traits.locale_text: Mené d'une main de fer par {mf|son dirigeant|sa dirigeante} légitime, le 32e régiment de Merov devint le fléau des ennemis de l'Empereur.

languages.text: Bajo la mano férrea de su líder, el 32.º regimiento de Merov se convirtió en el azote de los enemigos del Emperador.
languages.original_text: Led by the iron hand of its righteous ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the scourge of the Emperor's enemies.

traits.locale_text: Bajo la mano férrea de su líder, el 32.º regimiento de Merov se convirtió en el azote de los enemigos del Emperador.

languages.text: Haklı hükümdarının demir yumruğuyla yönetilen 32. Merov Alayı, İmparator'un düşmanlarının belası oldu.
languages.original_text: Led by the iron hand of its righteous ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the scourge of the Emperor's enemies.

traits.locale_text: Haklı hükümdarının demir yumruğuyla yönetilen 32. Merov Alayı, İmparator'un düşmanlarının belası oldu.

languages.text: Unter der ehernen Hand {mf|seines rechtschaffenen Herrschers|seiner rechtschaffenen Herrscherin} wurde das 32. Merov-Regiment zur Geißel aller Feinde des Imperators.
languages.original_text: Led by the iron hand of its righteous ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the scourge of the Emperor's enemies.

traits.locale_text: Unter der ehernen Hand {mf|seines rechtschaffenen Herrschers|seiner rechtschaffenen Herrscherin} wurde das 32. Merov-Regiment zur Geißel aller Feinde des Imperators.
